narrative:
Berea City has 12,249 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.5 percentage points.
